title: Create: package tooltip
description: lightweight qol addition to create mod packages
body:
### About

This mod replaces standart boiring package tooltip with better, visual version

with that addition to create you will able to see the whole package content in inventory instead of only 3 first items

### standart package tooltip:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df41271e1c32bd40a84cc720842479b7c984c05e.png)

### improved package tooltip:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e4a9b43b20d2e598b80aad6de21c17bd8947423.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9400af77a28ad1c53848b3c882002c5350bff033.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/801da0735fc2a59311bfbca13701c464ec03a624.png)

### Compatibility

addon has jade compatibility

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3338d11e1e51a94991513b1e584c5c362cfda797.png)

(package contents to jade tooltip can be added with Jade Addons  https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-forge)

### Support

that is a completely client sided create addon, don't install it on servers
